datasets.name: 40899d67
queryLines:
SELECT
  SUM(market_cap_usd) AS total_market_cap,
  SUM(volume_24h_usd) AS total_24h_volume,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN price_change_pct_24h > 0 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS num_gainers,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN price_change_pct_24h < 0 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS num_losers,
  ROUND(AVG(price_change_pct_24h), 2) AS avg_price_change_pct,
  MAX(snapshot_date) AS data_date
FROM
  cryptocoin.gold.kpi_market_overview;

datasets.name: 89e27635
queryLines:
WITH top50 AS (
    SELECT
        coin_name,
        market_cap_usd,
        global_market_cap_usd
    FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_market_overview
),
others AS (
    SELECT
        'Others (10,000+ coins)' AS coin_name,
        MAX(global_market_cap_usd) - SUM(market_cap_usd) AS market_cap_usd,
        MAX(global_market_cap_usd) AS global_market_cap_usd
    FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_market_overview
)

SELECT
    coin_name,
    ROUND(market_cap_usd / 1e9, 2) AS market_cap_billions,
    ROUND(market_cap_usd / global_market_cap_usd * 100, 2) AS share_pct
FROM top50

UNION ALL

SELECT
    coin_name,
    ROUND(market_cap_usd / 1e9, 2) AS market_cap_billions,
    ROUND(market_cap_usd / global_market_cap_usd * 100, 2) AS share_pct
FROM others

ORDER BY market_cap_billions DESC;

datasets.name: b55d88cd
queryLines:
SELECT
    coin_name,
    symbol,
    ROUND(price_change_pct_24h, 2) AS change_pct_24h,
    ROUND(price_usd, 4)           AS price_usd
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_market_overview
WHERE is_top5_gainer = true
ORDER BY price_change_pct_24h DESC;

datasets.name: 083df4a9
queryLines:
SELECT
    coin_name,
    symbol,
    ROUND(price_change_pct_24h, 2) AS change_pct_24h,
    ROUND(price_usd, 4)           AS price_usd
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_market_overview
WHERE is_top5_loser = true
ORDER BY price_change_pct_24h ASC;

datasets.name: 41500ca4
queryLines:
SELECT
    market_cap_rank     AS `market_rank`,
    coin_name           AS `Coin`,
    symbol              AS `Symbol`,
    ROUND(price_usd, 4)              AS `Price (USD)`,
    ROUND(price_change_pct_24h, 2)   AS `24h Change (%)`,
    market_cap_usd                    AS `Market Cap`,
    volume_24h_usd                    AS `24h Volume`,
    ROUND(price_to_ath_pct, 1)       AS `Below ATH (%)`
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_market_overview
ORDER BY market_cap_rank ASC;

datasets.name: f5a95ba6
queryLines:
WITH latest AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_gainers_losers
),
today_data AS (
    SELECT * FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_gainers_losers
    WHERE date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest)
)
SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN gainer_rank_daily = 1 THEN coin_name END)           AS top_gainer_today,
    MAX(CASE WHEN gainer_rank_daily = 1 THEN price_change_pct_24h END) AS top_gainer_pct,
    MIN(coin_name)                                                     AS top_loser_today,
    MIN(price_change_pct_24h)                                          AS top_loser_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(price_change_pct_24h), 2)                               AS avg_change_today
FROM today_data;

datasets.name: e692ed15
queryLines:
SELECT
    coin_name,
    symbol,
    ROUND(price_change_pct_24h, 2)  AS change_pct_24h,
    category,
    gainer_loser_badge
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_gainers_losers
WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_gainers_losers)
ORDER BY price_change_pct_24h DESC;

datasets.name: 6becc175
queryLines:
SELECT
    coin_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'Gainer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)   AS days_positive,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'Loser' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)    AS days_negative,
    COUNT(*)                                                 AS total_days,
    ROUND(AVG(price_change_pct_24h), 2)                     AS avg_daily_change
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_gainers_losers
GROUP BY coin_name
ORDER BY days_positive DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_volume_spike = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_spike_events,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_volume_spike = true THEN coin_id END) AS coins_with_spikes,
    MAX(market_sentiment) AS current_sentiment
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_price_trends;

datasets.name: 2fd0bde1
queryLines:
SELECT
  coin_name,
  hour_timestamp,
  ROUND(price_usd, 4) AS price_usd,
  volume_usd,
  is_volume_spike,
  market_sentiment
FROM
  cryptocoin.gold.kpi_price_trends
WHERE
  coin_name = :coin_filter
ORDER BY
  hour_timestamp ASC;

datasets.name: 35c66b53
datasets.displayName: P3 - Coin Price & Volume Spike Detection
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    hour_timestamp,
    price_usd,
    volume_usd,
    market_sentiment,
    AVG(volume_usd) OVER (
        ORDER BY hour_timestamp
        ROWS BETWEEN 168 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
      ) AS trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd
  FROM
    cryptocoin.gold.kpi_price_trends
  WHERE
    coin_name = :coin_filter
)
SELECT
  hour_timestamp,
  ROUND(price_usd, 2) AS btc_price,
  ROUND(volume_usd / 1e9, 2) AS current_volume_billions,
  ROUND(trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd / 1e9, 2) AS moving_avg_7d_volume_billions,
  ROUND(2 * trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd / 1e9, 2) AS spike_threshold_billions,
  CASE
    WHEN
      trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd IS NOT NULL
      AND volume_usd > 2 * trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd
    THEN
      ROUND(volume_usd / 1e9, 2)
    ELSE 0
  END AS volume_spike,
  CASE
    WHEN
      trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd IS NULL
      OR volume_usd <= 2 * trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd
    THEN
      ROUND(volume_usd / 1e9, 2)
    ELSE 0
  END AS volume_normal,
  CASE
    WHEN
      trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd IS NOT NULL
      AND volume_usd > 2 * trailing_7d_avg_volume_usd
    THEN
      'Spike'
    ELSE 'Normal'
  END AS volume_spike_status,
  market_sentiment
FROM
  base
ORDER BY
  hour_timestamp ASC;

datasets.name: cd1e067f
queryLines:
SELECT
    DATE(hour_timestamp)                         AS date,
    ROUND(MAX(btc_dominance_pct), 2)            AS btc_dominance,
    ROUND(MAX(global_market_cap_usd) / 1e12, 2) AS global_mktcap_trillions,
    MAX(market_sentiment)                        AS market_sentiment
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_price_trends
WHERE global_market_cap_usd IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE(hour_timestamp)
ORDER BY date ASC;

datasets.name: 2a861e62
queryLines:
WITH latest_vol AS (
    SELECT
        coin_name,
        ROUND(AVG(annualised_volatility_30d), 2) AS avg_volatility
    FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_volatility
    WHERE ohlc_date = (SELECT MAX(ohlc_date) FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_volatility)
    GROUP BY coin_name
)
SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN avg_volatility = (SELECT MAX(avg_volatility) FROM latest_vol)
        THEN coin_name END)               AS most_volatile_coin,
    MAX(avg_volatility)                    AS highest_volatility,
    MAX(CASE WHEN avg_volatility = (SELECT MIN(avg_volatility) FROM latest_vol WHERE avg_volatility > 0)
        THEN coin_name END)               AS least_volatile_coin,
    MIN(CASE WHEN avg_volatility > 0 
        THEN avg_volatility END)           AS lowest_volatility
FROM latest_vol;

SELECT
    coin_name,
    ROUND(AVG(annualised_volatility_30d), 2) AS avg_volatility_30d
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_volatility
WHERE ohlc_date = (SELECT MAX(ohlc_date) FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_volatility)
  AND annualised_volatility_30d IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY coin_name
ORDER BY avg_volatility_30d DESC
LIMIT 10;

datasets.name: ff326cc7
queryLines:
SELECT
  ohlc_date,
  'Close Price' AS series,
  ROUND(close_price, 2) AS price_value
FROM
  cryptocoin.gold.kpi_volatility
WHERE
  coin_name = :coin_filter_vol
  AND close_price IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  ohlc_date,
  '7-Day MA' AS series,
  ROUND(rolling_7day_avg_close, 2) AS price_value
FROM
  cryptocoin.gold.kpi_volatility
WHERE
  coin_name = :coin_filter_vol
  AND rolling_7day_avg_close IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  ohlc_date,
  '30-Day MA' AS series,
  ROUND(rolling_30day_avg_close, 2) AS price_value
FROM
  cryptocoin.gold.kpi_volatility
WHERE
  coin_name = :coin_filter_vol
  AND rolling_30day_avg_close IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
  ohlc_date ASC,
  series ASC;

datasets.name: a4064ccc
queryLines:
WITH daily_sentiment AS (
  SELECT
    coin_name,
    ohlc_date,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN is_bullish = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
         > SUM(CASE WHEN is_bullish = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      THEN true
      ELSE false
    END AS is_day_bullish
  FROM
    cryptocoin.gold.kpi_volatility
  GROUP BY
    coin_name, ohlc_date
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    coin_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_day_bullish = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bullish_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_day_bullish = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bearish_days,
    ROUND(
      SUM(CASE WHEN is_day_bullish = true THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)
        / COUNT(*)
        * 100,
      1
    ) AS bullish_pct
  FROM
    daily_sentiment
  GROUP BY
    coin_name
  ORDER BY
    bullish_pct DESC
)
SELECT
  coin_name,
  'Bullish Days' AS type,
  bullish_days AS days,
  bullish_pct
FROM
  ranked
UNION ALL
SELECT
  coin_name,
  'Bearish Days' AS type,
  bearish_days AS days,
  bullish_pct
FROM
  ranked
ORDER BY
  bullish_pct DESC,
  coin_name,
  type;

datasets.name: 24ddca93
queryLines:
SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN trending_position = 1 THEN coin_name END) AS number_1_trending,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_in_top50 = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)    AS trending_in_top50,
    COUNT(*)                                                 AS total_trending,
    MAX(CASE
        WHEN price_change_24h_percent = (
            SELECT MAX(price_change_24h_percent) FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_trending_widget
        ) THEN coin_name
    END) AS trending_with_highest_gain,
    MAX(snapshot_date) AS data_date
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_trending_widget;

datasets.name: 5cea3dbe
queryLines:
SELECT
    trending_position                    AS `#`,
    coin_name                            AS `Coin Name`,
    symbol                               AS `Symbol`,
    market_cap_rank                      AS `MCap Rank`,
    ROUND(coin_price, 4)                 AS `Price (USD)`,
    ROUND(price_change_24h_percent, 2)   AS `24h Change (%)`,
    CASE WHEN is_in_top50 = true THEN '✅' ELSE '❌' END AS `In Top 50`,
    snapshot_date                        AS `As Of`
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_trending_widget
ORDER BY trending_position ASC;

datasets.name: 9d383c40
queryLines:
SELECT
    coin_name,
    ROUND(price_change_24h_percent, 2) AS change_pct,
    CASE
        WHEN price_change_24h_percent > 0 THEN 'Gaining'
        ELSE 'Losing'
    END AS direction
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_trending_widget
ORDER BY trending_position ASC;

datasets.name: consistent_bar_long
queryLines:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    coin_name,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN category = 'Gainer' THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS days_positive,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN category = 'Loser' THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS days_negative
  FROM
    cryptocoin.gold.kpi_gainers_losers
  GROUP BY
    coin_name
  ORDER BY
    days_positive DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
  coin_name,
  'Positive Days' AS day_type,
  days_positive AS days
FROM
  base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  coin_name,
  'Negative Days' AS day_type,
  days_negative AS days
FROM
  base

datasets.name: c6fcc2f9
queryLines:
SELECT
    hour_timestamp,
    coin_name,
    CASE
        WHEN volume_usd >= 1e9 THEN ROUND(volume_usd / 1e9, 2)
        WHEN volume_usd >= 1e6 THEN ROUND(volume_usd / 1e6, 2)
        ELSE ROUND(volume_usd, 2)
    END AS current_volume,
    CASE
        WHEN spike_threshold >= 1e9 THEN ROUND(spike_threshold / 1e9, 2)
        WHEN spike_threshold >= 1e6 THEN ROUND(spike_threshold / 1e6, 2)
        ELSE ROUND(spike_threshold, 2)
    END AS spike_threshold_value,
    CASE
        WHEN volume_usd >= 1e9 OR spike_threshold >= 1e9 THEN 'Billion ($B)'
        WHEN volume_usd >= 1e6 OR spike_threshold >= 1e6 THEN 'Million ($M)'
        ELSE 'USD ($)'
    END AS scale_label,
    is_volume_spike,
    CASE
        WHEN is_volume_spike = true THEN 'SPIKE ⚡'
        ELSE 'Normal'
    END AS spike_status
FROM cryptocoin.gold.kpi_price_trends
WHERE coin_name = :coin_filter
ORDER BY hour_timestamp ASC;
